name: Knoxville
author: rslurry
description:
```markdown
Uses 2023 LODES data for the Knoxville area.
Includes demand for TYS airport; UT Knoxville, South College, Maryville College, and Pellissippi State universities; Dollywood, the Knoxville Zoo, Ijams Nature Center, Neyland Stadium, and the Knoxville Raceway.
```
